ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cows" (
  "cow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cow */,
  "tag_number" TEXT /* The tag number of the cow */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the cow */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the cow */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the cow (e.g., pregnant, lactating) */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the cow (e.g., healthy, sick) */,
  "parity" INTEGER /* Number of times the cow has given birth */,
  "calving_interval" INTEGER /* Interval between calvings in days */,
  "milk_production" REAL /* Average daily milk production in liters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "veterinarians" (
  "vet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each veterinarian */,
  "vet_name" TEXT /* Name of the veterinarian */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the veterinarian */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the veterinarian */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications held by the veterinarian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analgesia_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analgesia group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the analgesia group */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug used in the group */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the drug */,
  "administration_route" TEXT /* Administration route of the drug */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Potential side effects of the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_groups" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control group */,
  "control_name" TEXT /* Name of the control group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control group */,
  "placebo_type" TEXT /* Type of placebo used in the control group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assistance_levels" (
  "assistance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assistance level */,
  "assistance_level" TEXT /* Name of the assistance level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assistance level */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required to provide the assistance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assistance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analgesia_administration" (
  "administration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moment of administration */,
  "administration_moment" TEXT /* Moment of analgesia administration relative to calving */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the moment of administration */,
  "considerations" TEXT /* Important considerations for the administration moment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calving_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calving record */,
  "cow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cow that calved */,
  "calving_date" TEXT /* Date of the calving event */,
  "assistance_level" TEXT /* Degree of assistance required at calving */,
  "analgesia_administration_moment" TEXT /* Moment when analgesia was administered */,
  "analgesia_group" TEXT /* Group receiving analgesia treatment */,
  "control_group" TEXT /* Group receiving control treatment */,
  "lying_time" TEXT /* Average daily lying time */,
  "lying_bouts" TEXT /* Average daily number of lying bouts */,
  "lying_duration" TEXT /* Average daily duration of lying bouts */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Average daily number of steps taken */,
  "vet_id" INTEGER /* Veterinarian who assisted the calving */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Researcher who monitored the calving */,
  "calving_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the calving event (e.g., successful, complications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calving_records_analgesia_administration_moment FOREIGN KEY ("analgesia_administration_moment") REFERENCES analgesia_administration ("administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calving_records_assistance_level FOREIGN KEY ("assistance_level") REFERENCES assistance_levels ("assistance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calving_records_analgesia_group FOREIGN KEY ("analgesia_group") REFERENCES analgesia_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calving_records_cow_id FOREIGN KEY ("cow_id") REFERENCES cows ("cow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calving_records_control_group FOREIGN KEY ("control_group") REFERENCES control_groups ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "cow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cow */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity log */,
  "lying_time" TEXT /* Lying time for the day */,
  "lying_bouts" TEXT /* Number of lying bouts for the day */,
  "lying_duration" TEXT /* Duration of lying bouts for the day */,
  "activity_steps" TEXT /* Number of steps taken for the day */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Level of activity (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_cow_id FOREIGN KEY ("cow_id") REFERENCES cows ("cow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analgesia_treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analgesia treatment */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the calving record */,
  "analgesia_group" TEXT /* Analgesia group used in the treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the analgesia */,
  "administration_route" TEXT /* Administration route of the analgesia */,
  "administered_by" INTEGER /* Veterinarian who administered the analgesia */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analgesia_treatments_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES calving_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analgesia_treatments_administered_by FOREIGN KEY ("administered_by") REFERENCES veterinarians ("vet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "vet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the veterinarian */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_collaborations_vet_id FOREIGN KEY ("vet_id") REFERENCES veterinarians ("vet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing event */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date of the data sharing event */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data shared (e.g., calving records, activity logs) */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* Researcher or veterinarian who shared the data */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* Researcher or veterinarian who received the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_shared_with FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
